subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference, and we'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore a potential partnership.

Here are a few slots that work well on our end for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, April 21 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, April 22 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, April 23 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please pick whichever works best for you, or let us know if you'd prefer a different time.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not able to share internal personnel contact information. If you'd like to reach specific teams or senior stakeholders at our company, our public website has the appropriate contact channels to get you connected with the right people.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
